name: Cheese Garlic Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Buttermilk baking mix (such as Bisquick)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 450 degrees. Mix baking mix, milk and cheese until soft dough forms. Beat vigorously for 30 seconds. Drop dough by spoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until light brown. Combine butter, garlic powder and parsley flakes; brush over warm biscuits before removing from cookie sheet. Use all the butter mixture. Serve warm.
